name: Apricot Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain apricots and reserve juice.
2. Press apricots through a sieve.
3. Add enough reserved syrup or juice to make 1 cup; set aside.
4. Cream sugar and shortening together until fluffy.
5. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Combine dry ingredients and add to creamed mixture.
7. Add apricots.
8. Stir just until all ingredients are moistened.
9. Stir in walnuts.
10. Spoon batter into a greased loaf pan.
11. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until the bread tests done.
12. Remove from pan and place on a rack to cool.
